name: Hin Wong Pinnacle
region: Asia, Thailand, Southern Thailand, Surat Thani, Koh Tao
ocean: Pacific Ocean, South China Sea, Gulf Of Thailand
description: This site features a stunning pinnacle rising from 18 meters to just below the surface, surrounded by vibrant coral gardens. Schools of barracuda and trevally patrol the area, while occasional whale sharks pass by. The current can be strong, making it ideal for drift diving. Visibility often exceeds 20 meters, showcasing the rich marine life. Soft corals and anemones cover the rock formations, attracting clownfish and butterflyfish. Best suited for intermediate divers due to occasional currents.

name: Lighthouse Bay
region: Asia, Thailand, Southern Thailand, Surat Thani, Koh Tao
ocean: Pacific Ocean, South China Sea, Gulf Of Thailand
description: This site features a shallow bay with gentle currents, ideal for beginners. The sandy bottom slopes to 12 meters, dotted with granite boulders covered in soft corals. Look for schools of batfish, barracuda, and occasional reef sharks. Visibility averages 10-15 meters. Night dives reveal octopus and crustaceans. Easy access from shore or boat.
